title: The Lessons of History
subtitle: A Survey of the Culture and Civilization of Mankind
author: Will Durant and Ariel Durant
themes: Human nature is constant across time
Progress as increasing control over environment
excerpt: A masterful 128-page distillation of 5,000 years of human history, distilled from the Durants' 11-volume Story of Civilization. Will and Ariel Durant examine history through twelve lenses — geography, biology, race, morality, religion, economics, socialism, government, war, growth, and progress — to extract timeless lessons about human nature, society, and the cycles of civilization.
